title: YetAnotherCarpetAddition
body:
# YACA mod

**Yet Another Carpet Addition (YACA)** is an extension for the Carpet Mod. It provides Carpet Rules GUI, a variety of debugging tools,
performance optimizations, and game mechanic adjustments. 

Below is a full list of rules and their descriptions.

[中文版/Chinese](https://github.com/hotpad100c/yetanothercarpetaddition/blob/main/README-zn_ch.md)

[English](https://github.com/hotpad100c/yetanothercarpetaddition/blob/main/README.md)
